criteria.name: Personalized Content Recommendation
criteria.description: The app's ability to provide entertainment content recommendations tailored to individual user preferences using AI algorithms. The better the AI can learn user tastes, the higher the ranking.
criteria.sources: Multiple sources; primarily app descriptions and reviews

criteria.name: AI-Powered Content Generation
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes AI to generate original entertainment content, such as stories, music, or videos. This includes apps that generate text adventures, AI companions, or edit videos using AI.
criteria.sources: Multiple sources; primarily app descriptions and reviews

criteria.name: User Interactivity and Engagement
criteria.description: The level of interactivity the app offers and how well it keeps users engaged through AI-driven features, such as interactive narratives, virtual companions, or AI-enhanced content creation tools.

criteria.name: Content Variety and Freshness
criteria.description: The diversity of entertainment content offered and how frequently the app updates its content library with new AI-generated or AI-curated material.
criteria.sources: App store descriptions and user reviews

criteria.name: Creative Expression and Customization
criteria.description: The ability for users to express their creativity and customize their entertainment experiences through AI tools, such as creating AI personas, generating unique images, or personalizing virtual companions.
